overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character exploring a foggy, abandoned industrial lot at night. The character walks past wrecked vehicles toward a massive highway overpass, then continues along the industrial perimeter past a small building with a distinctive green door. The atmosphere is dark and moody with artificial street lighting cutting through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban lot with wrecked vehicles

events.description: player character begins walking forward from standing position
player character walks out of camera frame to the right

notable_agents.action: player character walking away from camera through the abandoned lot

entered.detail: wrecked yellow sports car with open doors and damaged body panels
tall street light casting yellowish illumination through the fog
red neon transit sign visible through the hazy night air
elevated concrete highway structure looming in the distance
skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a foggy abandoned lot at night. A player character stands briefly before walking forward past a wrecked yellow sports car. Street lights cast a yellow-green glow through the haze as the character moves toward a distant highway overpass, then exits the frame. The camera continues moving forward through the overgrown dirt and grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass approach with massive concrete pillars

events.description: moving from open lot to area dominated by massive highway infrastructure
entering the shadow of highway overpass reduces ambient light significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through industrial wasteland toward and alongside the highway underpass

entered.detail: massive red-painted concrete pillars supporting the highway deck above
dark colored derelict car partially obscured by vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the massive highway overpass, passing under its concrete pillars. The environment becomes more enclosed and shadowed. The city skyline remains visible through the fog in the background while the ground transitions to packed dirt and gravel near the highway retaining walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service passage between highway and utility buildings

events.description: approaching small industrial building with illuminated green metal door
passing close to green metal door creates strong green reflection on surroundings
passing the small building into wider industrial yard area

agents.ego_description: walking past the small concrete building with green door and continuing along the highway perimeter

entered.detail: small rectangular industrial shed with flat roof and corrugated walls
corrugated metal door painted bright green with strong light reflection
concrete retaining wall with metal railings supporting the highway embankment
large industrial pipes and conduits running along the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a small industrial building with a distinctive illuminated green door. Passing close to the door creates a strong green reflection on the surroundings. The camera continues past the building along a narrow passage between the highway retaining wall and industrial structures, moving toward a wider yard area with additional abandoned vehicles and infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial lot that transitions from an open wasteland into a confined corridor beneath a massive highway. It begins by gliding past a wrecked yellow sports car under the yellow-green glow of street lights, moving forward through overgrown dirt and grass as the player character exits the frame. As the camera approaches the highway overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed and shadowed beneath heavy concrete pillars, with the distant city skyline shimmering through the haze. The scene then shifts toward a small industrial building, where the camera passes a distinctive illuminated green door that casts a vivid reflection on the surroundings. Finally, the movement continues along a narrow passage between the retaining wall and industrial structures, opening up into a wider yard filled with abandoned vehicles and infrastructure.
